title: 3 Strange Facts About Cats

segments.text: Cats can make over 100 sounds; dogs only about 10.
But hold on, that's just the beginning!
They can also rotate their ears 180 degrees!
And they sleep for 13-16 hours a day.
Follow for more facts that sound fake but are real.

description: These cat facts will surprise you! Follow for daily facts! 🐱
